programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.desc: In a haunted Mayan jungle, a painful injury tests the resolve of survivalists Leah and Caesar. Surviving is a struggle as they are faced with suffocating humidity, hungry predators, torrential rainfall, unrelenting insects and intoxicating fruit.

programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: Max takes on the harsh African Savannah, constantly on the run to avoid territorial rhinos, elephants and lions. He gets a kill, but becomes a target as hungry predators close in to take his hard-earned win.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: EJ's Journey
programme.desc: Overcoming the harsh terrains of Tanzania, The Amazon, and 40-days in Colombia, EJ Snyder is a legend in the Naked universe. He gives new insights on his past challenges as he prepares for his toughest challenge yet: taking on frigid Bulgaria alone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Alone: Lonely Like The Wolf
programme.desc: In the frigid Bulgarian mountains, packs of wolves and territorial boars, stalk all-star survivalist EJ Snyder. Without a partner to protect him and struggling to make fire, EJ becomes a target for the deadly predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Breaking Borneo
programme.desc: Puma Cabra and Julie Wright have to survive in Sabah, Borneo for 21 days.

programme.desc: Overcoming the harsh terrains of Tanzania, The Amazon, and 40-days in Colombia, EJ Snyder is a legend in the Naked universe. He gives new insights on his past challenges as he prepares for his toughest challenge yet: taking on frigid Bulgaria alone.

programme.desc: In the frigid Bulgarian mountains, packs of wolves and territorial boars, stalk all-star survivalist EJ Snyder. Without a partner to protect him and struggling to make fire, EJ becomes a target for the deadly predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Two survivalists test their primitive skills on the razor sharp terrain of Andros Island in the Bahamas. Battling starvation, swarms of tiny predators and accusations about a partner's survival abilities turns this partnership into a bad marriage.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Salt Flat Rod
programme.desc: A hot rod lover from California challenges Steve to transform a 1931 Ford Model A into a salt flats racing machine, but getting it done before his client returns to Vegas will take a miracle.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Ranch Rod
programme.desc: Steve digs back into his Montana roots to build his cowboy buddy J.R. the ultimate ranch-rod by Frankenstein-ing together a pair of vintage Dodge trucks.

programme.desc: Rust-ridden Caddy dumped, Richard gambles that the GMG crew can recoup his losses with a '60 Bel Air. Christie talks money: first with a dad who wants to punk his teenage son with a Yugo and then with Richard trying to convince him to hire his sister.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part I
programme.desc: The crew takes on a '68 Shelby Mustang that looks sweet, but what's it hiding? Richard flips his lid when Tom and Jordan buy two junker cars from two tourists. Richard and KC travel to a secret lair to make a deal on a Lotus Cortina and an amphibicar.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Shelby Rent-A-Racer Resto, Part II
programme.desc: Engine issues plague the '68 Shelby. Richard flips the rare '66 Lotus Cortina and floating Amphicar for some fast cash. A classic Ford Falcon arrives at the garage and selling it would be icing on the cake.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mustang Mania
programme.desc: Aaron chances the wrath of the Big Monkey when he overrides Richard's instructions on a Mustang Fastback. After picking up a 'Holy Grail' Boss 429 Mustang in Minnesota, Richard questions Dennis' decision to buy a rustbucket Jaguar E-Class buried in snow.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Killer COPO Camaro
programme.desc: Richard gets his hands dirty building a $100,000 2013 COPO Camaro from the wheels up on the VIP assembly line. Aaron ignores his request to work on a newly arrived 1930 Model A and builds his own dream vehicle instead while the Monkeys tackle the A.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: C10 Race Truck/ Pikes Peak or Bust, Part I
programme.desc: As Aaron prepares for the Pikes Peak International Race, he learns that his Falcon still needs some work. Then Aaron springs on Richard that they have 3 weeks to build a Pace Race Truck for Pikes Peak. Meanwhile, Richard lands a sweet '31 Model A.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: C10 Race Truck/ Pike's Peak Pace Truck, Part II
programme.desc: Pikes Peak International Race is three days away and the C10 pace truck is nowhere near being complete. Aaron struggles to keep the Falcon damage free as he approaches the race of his life.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fleetline Superflip Frenzy
programme.desc: It's a gas monkey fire sale when Richard quick flips a menagerie of cars to make enough cash to buy back the first car he and Aaron built together 10 years ago. Richard and Dennis literally roll the dice on a 57 Chevy back in snowy Minnesota.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part I
programme.desc: Aaron and Richard find themselves a 1931 Model A to chop. What begins as a simple build quickly grows into a grand green machine. With less than a month to build this chromed out '60s show car from the ground up, Richard's wild plan may be too much.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Gina's Story
programme.desc: Gina and wife Beth live with Gina's mom but don't have her support. She and Gina's sister blame Beth for Gina's spiraling weight problem. Now it will take all Gina's will to leave home for Houston to get Dr. Now's help to save her life and her marriage.

programme.desc: 'Coco Vinny' wants to spread the 'Coco' love to the rest of the country by selling coconut beverages. Marcus Lemonis tries to get Coco to put down his ukulele lone enough to prove that his business concept is valid.

programme.title: The Profit: Skinny Latina
programme.desc: Local Miami celebrity Ana Quinoces' sauce and marinade business has failed to take off. While Ana's poor branding and overly defensive attitude prove to be a handful for Marcus, she must prove her mettle before The Profit invests.

programme.title: The Profit: Polar Bear Coolers
programme.desc: At Polar Bear Coolers sales have been plummeting the last few years due to a broken inventory process and an owner more concerned with 'rocking out' than appreciating his employees. Marcus tries to help improve communication and streamline the process.

programme.title: The Profit: Macaron Queen
programme.desc: A mother and daughter team dealing with health problems and family resentments, needs Marcus to help them face their issues and raise their Macaron business to the next level.

programme.title: The Profit: Hatbox/ Ramp
programme.desc: Marcus Lemonis shares insights on two companies where he never made a deal. Hat Box - a Texas haberdashery whose owner wants to be buried in her cash wrap; and Ramp - a Utah Ski and Snowboard manufacturer whose owner burned through millions of dollars.

programme.title: The Profit: Las Vegas Mini Gran Prix
programme.desc: A mini race car track and amusement park has become outdated and run out of gas. Marcus will try to help the owner get out of the past and teach his over-reactive ex-racer son to lead his employees rather than just yelling at them.

programme.title: The Profit: Rise of an American Floodtown
programme.desc: On a special episode, Marcus Lemonis travels to a town on the Mississippi River that has been devastated by flooding. Marcus will learn about the financial effects that a natural disaster has on a city as he tries to reinvigorate the townspeople.

programme.title: The Profit: Killed by Kindness
programme.desc: At a local dessert shop in Los Angeles, Marcus must help an unbelievably sweet and successful entrepreneur reign in her ideas before her many ventures cause chaos to her delectable empire.

programme.title: The Profit: Cover Your Hide
programme.desc: One woman’s mission to create her own line of handbags has resulted in a quality but a bland and over-priced product. Marcus must help her become a more creative and better business person.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An entrepreneur from Santa Monica, California, introduces an-electric car-sharing service; a monthly membership that makes it easy to book and attend family activities.

programme.title: The Loud House: Singled Out/ Brave the Last Dance
programme.desc: Feeling like a third wheel when her teammates find significant others, Lynn seeks a boyfriend just to fit in. Clyde recruits Lincoln and the gang to find out if a girl he has a crush on at school feels the same way.

programme.title: The Loud House: Washed Up/ Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: The Louds end up marooned on a deserted island when they rent a boat for a trip on the lake. And, Lincoln and Clyde find a frozen food company using Dad's recipes.

programme.title: The Loud House: Jeers for Fears/ Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stall Monitor/ A Pimple Plan
programme.desc: Worried that his teacher has bad things to say about him, Lincoln tries to delay his parent-teacher conference. Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Love Birds/ Rocket Men
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected. After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: The Song of Year is parodied with 'Bad Guys.' The Fart Fixer has a new way to relieve embarrassment. Bed, Bath and Beyoncé is back.

programme.title: The Substitute: Shaun White
programme.desc: A hidden camera prank show where celebrities are transformed by a team of special effects artists to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class of unsuspecting students.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb
programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Joey wants to get back together with a former girlfriend he dumped, so he tricks Monica into posing as his new gal pal. Ross helps Rachel, a laundry virgin, do her first load of wash. Chandler has a difficult time breaking up with his annoying girlfriend.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Butt
programme.desc: Joey gets his film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Chandler has second thoughts about a married woman who wants him to be her sex toy. Monica tries hard to prove to her friends that she really doesn't have an A-type personality.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blackout
programme.desc: During a blackout, Chandler is trapped with a beautiful model and Rachel meets Paolo.

programme.title: Mom: A Bouncy Castle and An Aneurysm
programme.desc: When Bonnie connects with a handsome, sober stranger, Christy worries that she's jeopardizing her relationship with Adam.

programme.title: Mom: Roast Chicken and a Funny Story
programme.desc: When a heartbroken Bonnie drives everyone crazy, Christy begs Adam to take her back.

programme.title: Mom: Night Swimmin' and An English Muffin
programme.desc: When Bonnie discovers Adam is still close with his ex-wife, Christy worries the emotional fallout could jeopardize Bonnie's sobriety.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: George Lopez: Jason Tutors Max
programme.desc: When George and Angie hire a beautiful tutor for Max, he becomes too distracted to learn.

programme.title: George Lopez: Angie Gets Tanked
programme.desc: When George and Angie fill in at the dunk tank at school, the students pull a prank.

programme.title: George Lopez: The Art of Boxing
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to his mom, Max takes up boxing at a local ring owned by Laila Ali.

programme.title: George Lopez: George's House of Cards
programme.desc: George and Angie's newly divorced dad, spar over a nickel-and-dime poker game.

programme.title: Full House: Michelle a La Cart
programme.desc: Stereotypes are challenged when Michelle and Rebecca build a race car and Joey dances.

programme.title: Full House: Be Your Own Best Friend
programme.desc: Michelle can't decide who she wants to be her best friend; will it be Denise or Teddy?

programme.title: Full House: A Date With Fate
programme.desc: D.J. and Danny both go on dates and accidentally end up at the same restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Stop a Meltdown/ Pups and the Mystery of the Missing Cellphones
programme.desc: Everything's melting in Adventure Bay, so the pups must find a way to use their fire-pup power to bring back a chill. Cell phones are going missing, so the pups need to call on the police for some help.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins/ Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Giant Chicken/ Pups Stop Harold's Deep Freeze
programme.desc: The Ladybird is back and Chickaletta has super powers. The Mighty Twins join the Mighty Pups to save a giant chicken and the town.The Mighty Pups have to stop Harold Humdinger before he puts Adventure Bay in a deep freeze so he can become mayor.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Big Twin Trick/ Pups Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own. Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it's a total cat-astrophe.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Copycat
programme.desc: The Mighty Pups get Charged Up to take on The Copycat, their most formidable foe to date.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot / Mighty Pu
programme.desc: Harold Humdinger uses a giant robot to make his own town. The copycat is back and Adventure Bay need a mighty rescue.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Pinned Playdate/ Ryan's Golden Playdate
programme.desc: Ryan's going to need to pin down his challenges before getting the three counts on his door smashing playdate. Later, Ryan performs his challenge completing the floor routine before earning all the rings with his golden playdate.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles. SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Escape from Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Movie: Just Friends
programme.desc: A formerly overweight record producer returns to his hometown for the holidays after a 10-year absence only to compete against a former classmate for the affections of the girl he loved in high school.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Playlist: Pilot
programme.desc: Zoey, an introverted computer programmer living in San Francisco, begins to hear the innermost desires of the people around her through song.

programme.title: Movie: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The life of country music star Johnny Cash. After serving in the air force in Germany, Cash buys a guitar and begins touring. He develops a drug habit, but after getting divorced, he is eased off his addiction by June Carter, whom he eventually marries.

programme.title: Movie: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The life of country music star Johnny Cash. After serving in the air force in Germany, Cash buys a guitar and begins touring. He develops a drug habit, but after getting divorced, he is eased off his addiction by June Carter, whom he eventually marries.

programme.title: Botched: Stitched Up Sisters
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow keeps it all in the family when he performs full body work on a pair of co-dependent sisters. Dr. Nassif operates on a large man with an even larger nose and the doctors meet Youtuber and extreme waist trainer Penny Brown.

programme.title: Botched: Where the Wildd Things Are
programme.desc: The doctors help the self-proclaimed 'most unlucky person in the world.' Lacey Wildd is back with a problem bigger than her boobs. A transgender showgirl seeks the Doctors help to become her favorite cartoon character.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Botched: Say Yes to the Breasts
programme.desc: Former actress Heather fought a flesh-eating disease that left her with no breasts. Dr. Dubrow helps a spiritual woman who has a butt on her belly and Dr. Nassif helps a man whose doctor left a thumbprint on his nose.

programme.title: Botched: The Wizard of Schnoz
programme.desc: Terry makes a breast cancer survivor feel whole again while Paul operates on two sisters' twin beaks, affirming that he is the true Wizard of Schnoz. Terry gets a visit from his favorite patient...his wife, Heather.

programme.title: Botched: The Serial Filler
programme.desc: Farrah Abraham visits the doctors about her blown up lips, a friend of Dr. Dubrow's seeks help for his botched stomach and Jessa hopes the doctors can help erase the physical reminders left from a fatal car accident.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Greedy
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif performs a rhinoplasty on a woman who had her first nose job at 12 years old. Dr. Dubrow works on a patient who wants to retire her Baywatch boobs and the doctors are left speechless by a patient who can only be described as 'unique.'

programme.title: Botched: Boner-free Zone
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow transforms a woman's 'boner-free zone.' Dr. Nassif fixes the nose of a woman who had her dentist perform her rhinoplasty, and the doctors meet a mother who had extensive plastic surgery to look exactly like her daughter.

programme.title: Botched: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Paul follows a hunch and orders more tests for a woman with a severely botched nose and discovers shocking news. The doctors work in tandem to get two 'botched bunnies' back in centerfold shape.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dr. Nassif helps a fellow Lebanese patient get the nose she wants in time for her wedding, Dr. Dubrow attempts to fix a woman's strip mall boob job, and Mama June from 'Honey Boo Boo' fame needs a fupa lift.

programme.title: Botched: Comic Proportions
programme.desc: A cosplayer meets with the doctors to make her body more comical. Later, Dr. Dubrow helps a woman whose previous plastic surgery left her with a heart on her butt, while Dr. Nassif operates on a woman who had her nose ruined over 30 years ago.

programme.title: Botched: 4000cc's and Counting
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a man with three eyebrows and later, a woman wants to downsize money makers.

programme.title: Botched: Nothing Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A young woman visits the doctors and multiple silicone removal surgeries have left her with a distorted derriere, while a leggy painter needs her nose fixed to help lift her mother's guilty conscience.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All-American All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy cruises the country for all-stars, from burgers to dogs to cafes and neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ultimate Bacon Fest
programme.desc: Guy brings on the bacon, and it's not just for breakfast. From New York to California and Texas to Toronto, it's stacked in sandwiches, crumbled in ice cream, paired with pasta and loaded in mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Taste Of Italy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up his favorite Italian joints from over the years. In Scottsdale, Arizona, a real-deal Italian grocer crankin' out scratch-made staples like gnocchi and prosciutto that bring a tear to Guy's eye.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Amore Sucre
programme.desc: It's a sweet week in boot camp, with the recruits playing a culinary version of Candyland in which they must identify sweet treats using all their senses.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Power of Jane
programme.desc: Actress Jane Krakowski teams up with Chef Michael Symon to steal Bobby Flay's spotlight. They bring in no-nonsense chefs Attila Bollok from Los Angeles and Matthew Spinner from Cleveland to give Bobby an early curtain call.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Guess Who's Back?
programme.desc: Two chefs want another shot at Bobby. Fine-dining chef Ryan Lory and Italian chef Jackie Rothong are back for redemption, and they've got Chef Josh Capon and Katie Lee in their corner as they seek sweet revenge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sweet, Sweet Revenge!
programme.desc: Brooklyn pastry chefs Clarice Lam and Caroline Schiff are back in the kitchen for revenge after Bobby Flay beat them with something sweet. Michael Symon and Josh Capon judge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Marital Match
programme.desc: Husband and wife Cody and Sam Carroll of Cajun Aces compete to prove that love is a kitchen battlefield. It's only fitting that The Kitchen's dynamic duo, Sunny Anderson and Jeff Mauro, officiate the attempt to send Bobby Flay off unhappily ever after.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider
programme.desc: Doug feels the road calling and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself a motorcycle.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Strike One

programme.title: The King of Queens: Strike Too

programme.title: The King of Queens: Strike Out
programme.desc: While the IPS strike continues, Carrie and Kelly worry about their husbands' sanity.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Lush Life
programme.desc: Doug goes on an eating binge when Carrie goes out for drinks after work with a friend.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Flash Photography

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Back Off, Mary Poppins

programme.desc: Alan's self image is shaken when Charlie admits to having played a dirty trick on him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade

programme.title: The Goldbergs: 8-Bit Goldbergs

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild - Fearless: Legendary Turtle of Texas

programme.title: Movie: Need for Speed
programme.desc: Two years after being framed and imprisoned for manslaughter, a blue-collar mechanic joins a cross-country car race in the hopes of exacting revenge. With a bounty placed on his car by the man who framed him, he must dodge the authorities at every turn.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost in the Shell
programme.desc: In the near future, a cyber-enhanced human named Major is devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals. On the hunt for a new terrorist that can hack people, she discovers that her past is a lie, and she must solve the mystery of her life.

programme.title: Home Town: A Town to Call Home
programme.desc: Kristen dreams of watching her kids grow up in a small town like she did, but as a military family, they are always on the move. Now that husband is close to retirement, they've decided to settle down so their young children have a place to call home.

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: A Modern Millennial Makeover
programme.desc: An engaged couple is ready to buy a home of their own so they can start the next chapter in their lives together. An engaged couple is ready to buy a home of their own so they can start the next chapter in their lives together.

programme.title: Nightwatch: The Darkest Shift on the Scariest Night
programme.desc: Halloween provides a fitting backdrop to a night on the job that includes some chilling calls. Captain Kevin leads the fire fighters battling a blaze that's engulfed a house, and hopefully nothing more. Becca responds to a call she hoped to never get.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Detroit SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Joseph 'Brain' Weekley and the Detroit SWAT team are called to the scene of a barricaded gunman who is possibly schizophrenic and off his medication. Officer Jason 'Diesel' Brasgalla attends college classes.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hunting Ground
programme.desc: Nicole White is in the middle of a bitter custody battle when she vanishes. Suspicion falls on an online date until her husband turns up unexpectedly with his face scratched.

programme.title: Web of Lies: In Dark Corners
programme.desc: Vulnerable mother of five Laura Simonson seeks comfort in the online world of sexual bondage. Lured by a mysterious user named 'Mr. Handcuffs,' Laura doesn't know that she's walking straight into his twisted trap.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Social Media Butterfly
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman moves to New York City, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. A tragic chain of events unfolds in which her unique tattoo plays a critical role.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Have to Get Out
programme.desc: Edward Pehowic harbored dark secrets before he married Robin Healey, and she would catch only glimpses of her husband's dark side. But it wasn't until after she finally escaped from him once and for all that she realized just how evil he was.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Wasn't Right
programme.desc: Beverly Stephens knew something wasn't right with her husband, Reginald Brooks, but never thought there was a killer inside him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Have to Get Out
programme.desc: Edward Pehowic harbored dark secrets before he married Robin Healey, and she would catch only glimpses of her husband's dark side. But it wasn't until after she finally escaped from him once and for all that she realized just how evil he was.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: When Linda found out her biological father was her family friend, Greg Scarpa, she was overjoyed. But when the rest of Greg's bloody secrets came out, Linda learned that being part of his family wasn't just dangerous, it was potentially deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Dead Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: A man who is meticulous about his lawn runs into conflict with a new neighbour who doesn't have the same priorities. The feud between the two men viciously escalates, ultimately ending in an episode of shocking violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Final Notice
programme.desc: What do you do when you fear for your life and the person at the end of the 911 line is the one you need protecting from? Two Altadena families are unlucky enough to find out when an LAPD cop moves in next door.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Death by Neighbor
programme.desc: New beginnings take a horrible turn when members of a blended family become deathly ill after ingesting a rare poison.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Houseknives
programme.desc: Two families with several children between them get along famously until one of the mothers starts to dictate to the other how she should be raising her kids. Battle lines are drawn, violence flares, and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Put on a Happy Face
programme.desc: Melissa Moore loved being daddy's little girl, and thought her father, Keith Jesperson, could do no wrong. As she got older, that admiration was replaced by fear, and then by the horror of learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving a Hand Hewn Cabin and a Rare Hand Cut Chimney
programme.desc: Mark and the guys explore a perfect pioneer settlement complete with wood, water and stone. They save the classic log cabin and repurpose the rare hand-cut sandstone chimney. Sherman helps local stonemasons turn the chimney into a fire pit grill.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Rose's Cabin From the Woods
programme.desc: Mark and the guys have to build their own road to reach a cabin that has been overgrown for 11 years! Rose never got to finish her dream cabin, but Mark will make sure it gets a new life.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Double Pen Log Vacation Rental
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work with one of their most passionate and knowledgeable clients yet. Karen Tillary is building a vacation rental and Mark is in charge of the log addition.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Reclaiming a One-Room Log Schoolhouse
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders go deep in the holler to reclaim a rare one-room log schoolhouse full of history. Back on the bone yard, the schoolhouse gets a whole new life.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Stressful Right Now
programme.desc: Mike and Teresa begin building their walls, but the winch is more dangerous than they realized. Paige and Cody use a boom truck, forcing the team to work extra cautiously. Mike and Kathleen find a nasty surprise at the bottom of the mountain.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen move to interior work, but the remote location is still slow with progress. At Paige and Cody's site, mechanical failures prevent the project from finishing before dog sled season. As Mike and Teresa build higher, it gets more dangerous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen move to interior work, but the remote location is still slow with progress. At Paige and Cody's site, mechanical failures prevent the project from finishing before dog sled season. As Mike and Teresa build higher, it gets more dangerous.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Nathan's Dream Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design the ultimate man cave for a musician and his friend. They go all out, giving the yurt indoor skate ramps, a refurbished pool table and a stage complete with drums and guitars.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Mare Island Naval Yard
programme.desc: Bug and his team help transform a client’s kitchen with salvaged Douglas fir from the historic Mare Island Naval Yard.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Wine Stave Porch Railing
programme.desc: Bug and his team attempt a large, stubborn tear down that could be their biggest score ever, if the materials are even salvageable. Then, the gang takes on a front porch renovation that forces them to get creative with 18th-century Victorian materials.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Harlem Globetrotters
programme.desc: Four cupcake makers are going to have to pull out all their baking tricks if they want to win the chance to have their cupcakes center court at a huge fan event for the world famous Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Indiana State Fair/ Old Canal Days
programme.desc: At the Indiana State Fair, Noah Cappe devours a colossal grilled cheese sandwich and a fried elephant ear filled with fruit and Greek tomato balls. At Old Canal Days in Illinois, he samples loaded potato bites, Chicago-style pizza pie and a donut treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Illinois State Fair/ Erie County Fair
programme.desc: Noah gets lucky in Illinois with the horseshoe sandwich, and gets Buffalo chicken pizza in New York.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: K-Days/ North Dakota State Fair
programme.desc: Noah begs for s'mores mini donuts in Edmonton and heads to North Dakota for wild rice burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Canadian National Exhibition/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is at the Canadian National Exhibition in Toronto to try a Thanksgiving waffle. Then he's off the Prairiefest in Oswego where he indulges in a kimchee Korean hot dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston
programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Food Paradise: The Comfort Zone
programme.desc: Diners cozy up to some of the most feel-good foods around the country, including fully loaded tater tots, outrageous shakes and mouth-watering Australian meat pies.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Feast from the East
programme.desc: The most artful and indulgent Asian cuisines across the country are highlighted, from authentic hand-tossed noodles and colourful arcade-inspired dumplings to monster-sized sushi and creative curries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Style
programme.desc: Entertaining friends and family should be fun, but it isn't always the case. Laura shows us her secret to an impressive and stress free family meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Lessons From Nonna
programme.desc: Laura's passion for food and cooking was inspired by her Italian grandmother, who taught her not only how to cook, but how to spread love through food. Today Laura takes you on a very personal journey through her some of her Nonna's favorite dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: In this show Laura makes a mouth-watering brunch that pairs both sweet and savory ingredients.

programme.title: Simply Laura: All Day Breakfast
programme.desc: Laura's inspired to create an all-day breakfast menu. She prepares creme fraiche and veggie frittata, smoked salmon and dill quiche and a breakfast bruschetta bar.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Date Night
programme.desc: Laura creates a date-night dinner at home from fresh ingredients, without a hefty price tag. Seared New York Strip steak takes center plate, but no steak dinner is complete without the sides, and no date night complete without flowers.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Girls' Day and Night!
programme.desc: Laura spends a full day with her girls before heading out for some shopping and pampering she tackles some finger foods that she can assemble before the fun.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Waffles Gone Wild
programme.desc: Ordinary waffles be warned: Chef Bobby Flay has your number! Bobby wows with a menu of unexpected waffle creations like Cornbread Waffles with Ranch Style Eggs & Cilantro Crema and Glazed Waffle Donuts!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wake Up Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's coffee-inspired creations include Scrambled Eggs with Sweet Potato Biscuits, Ham Steak & Red Eye Gravy, and Espresso-Chocolate Chip Banana Bread with Espresso.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Irish Style Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases his Irish pride in this festive and colorful brunch menu including a bangers and egg sandwich with Irish cheddar and tomato jam, Irish-style potato pancakes with mustard-chive crème fraiche and smoked salmon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: North Dakota State Fair/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: In North Dakota, host Noah Cappe chows down on Wild Rice Burgers, Idaho Tacos and Kettle Corn, which make up the regional fare in this western state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Fertile Fields to the Red River Valley
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota where he goes local with the North Woods Sandwich and Barbe-chos, and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the Redneck Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beach Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure. He'll sample creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Mighty Meatless
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe finds veggie-friendly treats that don't need meat to be indulgent. He tries plenty of delicious, salad-inspired snacks on fairgrounds across the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.
