programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Oh Brother Where Art Thou/ The Wall
programme.desc: Alvin thinks he's losing his mind when Simon goes missing and no one else even remembers who Simon is. When the girls at school cast votes for the cutest chipmunk on the bathroom wall, Alvin worries about the results.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Granny Awards/ Sick Day
programme.desc: Dave is thrilled when he thinks he's nominated for a Grammy, but it's actually an award for aging musicians. Alvin and Kevin pretend to be sick to miss school and sneak off to the Dagarack Convention.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Allergic Reaction/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: Theodore develops an allergy to an unknown ingredient; Jeanette and the Chipmunks try to rescue a chimpanzee Bocarter keeps in a cage.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Stage Fright/ Gone Flushin'
programme.desc: Vicky decides to be an actress and make Timmy help her land her first role. Dad accidentally flushes Timmy and the fairies down the toilet.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: Squidward's arch nemesis, Squilliam, has returned to harass Squidward on his failed life since high school.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box
programme.desc: When the health inspector comes, Krabs tries to get the joint up to code.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sand Castles in the Sand/ Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A friendly day of building sand castles soon turns into all out war when SpongeBob and Patrick use their sand creations to battle each other. When Gary's shell breaks, SpongeBob tries to find him a replacement.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wand Ambition/ Lost in Transylvation
programme.desc: Mavis' lost magic wand falls into the wrong hands and Hotel Transylvania gets trapped inside a snow globe. Mavis finally gets a word in the Vamptionary!

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Who Let the Frogs Out?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Dungeon
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part One
programme.desc: When the Goblin opens portals to alternate worlds, Spider-Man must team up with alternative versions of himself to stop his archenemy.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man's adventures in alternate worlds continue when he meets Spider-Man Noir, a Spider-Man from a black and white retro world. Then, after travelling to a place where all The Avengers are animals, our hero teams up with Spider-Ham!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Three
programme.desc: In his pursuit of Goblin, Spider-Man teams up with Spider-Knight, a medieval Spider-Man. Spidey also meets Miles Morales, a young Spider-Man from a world where Peter Parker fell in the line of duty!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Four
programme.desc: Goblin's plan comes to fruition as he and Spdier-Man return to their own reality. To stop Goblin, Spider-Man needs the help of the other Spider-Man he met along his journey, but Electro makes a play against both sides.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Return of the Guardians of the Galaxy
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Nova must help the Guardians of the Galaxy face a threat that has followed them to Earth.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Holy Babies/ Aunt Lydia's New Clothes
programme.desc: Mavis fibs that it is her birthday to get an ice scream bar. After 500 years, Aunt Lydia's invisibility poncho arrives.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Stepmonsters/ Better Know Your Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Song Remains Asleep/ Baby Got Hunchback
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia wants to replace the hotel's elevator music. Mavis and the gang uncover Quasimodo's secret recipe for dirt flambé.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Portrait of Mavis As a Young Vampire/ Goo Crush
programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wand Ambition/ Lost in Transylvation
programme.desc: Mavis' lost magic wand falls into the wrong hands and Hotel Transylvania gets trapped inside a snow globe. Mavis finally gets a word in the Vamptionary!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: I Only Have Eyes for Goo/ Talk Blobbish To Me
programme.desc: Thanks to a cursed prescription, Wendy's new glasses allow her to read minds.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: God Rest Ye Merry Gentle-Mannequins
programme.desc: Bob inherits a storage unit, and the whole family imagines treasures, but only finds a man named Chet living inside.

programme.title: Family Guy: Space Cadet
programme.desc: To boost Chris' self-esteem, Peter and Lois send him to space camp. When camp ends and the Griffins come to pick Chris up, they accidentally are launched into outer space.

programme.title: Family Guy: Brian's Play
programme.desc: Brian writes a play that's a hit in Quahog, but his confidence is shaken when he reads a play Stewie wrote that's much better than his.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Giggity Wife
programme.desc: When Peter, Quagmire and Joe visit the Harvard University campus, Quagmire accidentally marries a prostitute. In order to get out of his marriage, Quagmire pretends to be lovers with Peter.

programme.title: Family Guy: Valentine's Day in Quahog
programme.desc: Love is in the air on Valentine's Day. Meg dates a guy from the internet, Stewie uses his time machine and falls for a girl in the '60s and Peter and Lois decide to stay in bed all day.

programme.title: Family Guy: Chris Cross
programme.desc: To buy new sneakers, Chris steals money from Lois' purse. When Meg catches him in the act, she forces him to do all of her chores in exchange for keeping mum.

programme.title: Family Guy: Call Girl
programme.desc: When the Griffins find themselves in a financial bind, Lois is forced to find a job of her own. She gets discovered by a 'voiceover' talent agent named Randy, who actually runs an adult-only phone line and pays his employees generously.

programme.title: Family Guy: Turban Cowboy
programme.desc: When Peter, Quagmire and Joe need a jolt in their mundane lives, they decide to go skydiving. But after an unfortunate accident, Peter ends up in the hospital, where he befriends Mahmoud who convinces Peter to convert to Islam.

programme.title: Family Guy: 12 and a Half Angry Men
programme.desc: A bloody murder occurs at Mayor West's mansion, and he is the prime suspect. The mayor is put on trial, and it is up to the citizens of Quahog to determine if he is guilty or not.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bigfat
programme.desc: When Peter, Quagmire and Joe fly on a private plane to Canada, they crash in the middle of the wilderness, far from civilization. Peter is chosen to find help, but ends up going missing for two months.

programme.title: American Dad!: Pride Before the Fail
programme.desc: Roger tries to force Hayley into graduating from community college so he can move into her room. Klaus repairs Francine's car.

programme.title: American Dad!: Enter Stanman

programme.title: Conan

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Windbreaker City

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Wednesday Incident

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Jeff's Worst Nightmare

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Goodbye Cruel Waterworld

programme.desc: Dr. Blue takes a trip to a vegan cattle ranch to castrate five 1200-pound adult bulls. Tension runs high when a scary bulldozing occurs. Dr. Ross treats a hen with rough-mating injury. A young puppy needs a serious surgery after being hit by a car.

programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lewis and Machuca
programme.desc: In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people out doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bondurants
programme.desc: A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened. As time goes on and with little evidence against them, there's no telling how far they'll go.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Vues
programme.desc: When a correctional officer is murdered it seems like an act of vengeance, but soon a love triangle is exposed. After learning his wife is having an affair, a husband plans to kill her lover and enlists the help of his brothers to carry out the task.

programme.title: Snapped: Beatrice Camper
programme.desc: A popular cab-driver is shot dead on the job, but the search for his killer reveals his wife's secret prison visits, a torrid affair and a possible conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped: Wanda Stanley
programme.desc: A Brooklyn native is found shot to death in the backseat of his car in a rough Atlanta neighborhood. The police have to figure out if trouble followed him south or if the killer is in his inner circle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: King County, WA
programme.desc: In one of the largest and longest manhunts in the U.S., authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer. But now it's a cat and mouse game, as they try to get inside his mind, so he'll lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Courtship
programme.desc: When Detective Mike Logan and his new partner Detective Nola Falacci investigate the murder of a couples therapist, they initially suspect one of her patients. As they follow the trail, it doubles back to her husband and his work as a divorce court judge.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Self-Made
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Eames investigate a case involving a budding novelist who was tortured and then murdered in her own apartment. The investigation uncovers equally deadly predators lurking in the writer's seemingly disparate worlds.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Offense
programme.desc: Members of a college football team are suspected of sexual abuse in a well-publicized rape case but the witness is found dead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One
programme.desc: A live video is streamed online showcasing a tortured man being beaten and burned alive. Upon further investigation, the victim's identity is traced back to that of a man who had been locked up for statutory rape.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fork in the Road
programme.desc: When Lindsay receives a panicked phone call from her mother, Bunny, whose boyfriend has just been shot, Lindsay must figure out the best way to approach the situation as her mother is now the main suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Promise
programme.desc: When a young Latina woman is brutally murdered, Intelligence suspects she may have been working as a drug mule.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Snitch
programme.desc: While investigating a drug related homicide, Intelligence is stonewalled by the 'no snitch' culture of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Home
programme.desc: When Intelligence busts a meth lab run by gang leader Marshall Carter, they uncover a rehoming scam in which children adopted from foreign countries are abandoned, then sold online.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fallen
programme.desc: A picture perfect family is shot dead in their home and the team goes in search of a drug dealer with a likely connection.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Care Under Fire
programme.desc: In the wake of several gang related child abductions, Intelligence must race against time to find a kidnapped boy.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Monster
programme.desc: Intelligence is on the track of a pill mill spreading in the suburbs of Chicago and the doctor enabling it after the death of Judge Tommy Wells' daughter leads them to it. Voight discovers who had been leaking the 21st's information.

programme.title: Movie: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The Channel 4 news team reunites to helm a 24 hour news channel, but they have some stiff competition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets an 'F'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet
programme.desc: After the kids find an album cover with Homer's picture on it, Homer reveals that he used to perform in a barbershop quartet with Principal Skinner, Chief Wiggum and Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Homer's garage sale is upstaged by George Bush, who is moving in across the street. When Bart receives a spanking, Homer starts a prank war that escalates into a one-on-one confrontation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Iconoclast
programme.desc: As the town's bicentennial parade approaches, Homer campaigns successfully for the job of town crier. Meanwhile, Lisa encounters disbelief from everyone when she uncovers evidence that the town hero may have been a fraud.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror VII
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa find Bart's demented twin brother; Lisa's develops a higher form of life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Trouble With Trillions
programme.desc: When Homer finds himself the subject of a tax audit, he works a deal with the IRS.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer to the Max

programme.title: The Simpsons: Saddlesore Galactica

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart to the Future

programme.title: The Simpsons: Large Marge

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Strange Encounters
programme.desc: Experts investigate the mysteries inside the Bermuda Triangle and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets: Tides of Death
programme.desc: New investigations into the Bermuda Triangle’s strange rogue waves reveal if these killer ocean phenomena could explain Triangle’s infamous disappearances.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets: Curse of the Ghost Ships
programme.desc: New evidence could explain the mysterious ghost ship sightings of the Bermuda Triangle, and using the latest technology, experts investigate if these strange encounters are real or just an illusion.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth
programme.desc: Eerie ghost ships stranded in an alien desert, sinister ruins known as the Dragon's Teeth, and a ghostly complex with a bloody past are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hitler's Lost Bunker
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's underground bunker was the home of some of the greatest secrets of the Nazi's. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to discover new evidence of Hitler's evil vision for global domination.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Corporal Rich Emberlin and Corporal Robert Cockerill must charge into a house to nab a murder suspect who allegedly knifed his neighbour to death; in their off hours, Emberlin tries desperately to get his ex-girlfriend back and Cockerill gets in shape.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Steve Claggett and Rich Emberlin are called out to help execute an arrest warrant on a gang of suspected crack-cocaine dealers barricaded inside a house; the SWAT team's tactical skills are put to the test as they overcome the barriers-to-entry.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: American Justice: Murder on the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Kosta Fotopoulos, a member of the Greek community in Daytona, invents a club for killers, and convinces his lover to kill a drifter so she can join.

programme.title: American Justice: Body of Evidence: The Tom Capano Trial
programme.desc: Prosecutor Thomas Capano was sentenced to death for murdering his ex-lover.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: The first responders deal with a rash of scary calls, including a man suffering from amnesia after getting hit by a car and a woman who fell off a roof.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Heroes Among Us
programme.desc: When the men and women serving New Orleans get word that one of their own has been critically injured, they reflect on the risks they all take.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Trauma Drama
programme.desc: Brandon and Coop race to save a man's life after he was struck by a bullet in the chest. New Nightwatch Nation team Alyssa and Kasie are called to a special needs pediatric patient in Baton Rouge which reminds Alyssa of her own miracle baby at home.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: The Criminal Caregiver
programme.desc: After a vulnerable elderly man is brutalized in his rural home, John joins a thrilling manhunt for Derek Whisenand. And when newlywed bliss turns into a vicious crime, Cal goes boots on the ground on the trail of fugitive Arnoldo Jimenez.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Last Seduction
programme.desc: After John Pitman and Tracey Richter were married, John began fearing for his life. The family pets disappeared and Tracey had a gun, but when a neighbor was killed, Tracey claimed that John was behind it.

programme.title: The Green River Killer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: Mark of the Grim Reaper
programme.desc: A tattoo of the Grim Reaper helps identify a murder victim, and could reveal even more about the circumstances surrounding the brutal crime.

programme.title: The Green River Killer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: Victims of The Green River Killer are still being found today. Now, with access to hundreds of hours of unseen police footage, we will reveal the shocking truth behind one of America's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: Mark of the Grim Reaper
programme.desc: A tattoo of the Grim Reaper helps identify a murder victim, and could reveal even more about the circumstances surrounding the brutal crime.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Last Seduction
programme.desc: After John Pitman and Tracey Richter were married, John began fearing for his life. The family pets disappeared and Tracey had a gun, but when a neighbor was killed, Tracey claimed that John was behind it.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Doctor and the Beauty Queen
programme.desc: Rich doctor and devoted Mormon, Martin MacNeill begins a torrid affair with fiery vixen, Gypsy Willis while his wife Michele tends to their children. But when Michele finds out and demands Martin end the affair, someone is bound to get burned.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Tall, Dark and Deadly
programme.desc: Chanin Starbuck is a mother of five looking forward to a fresh start after divorcing her ex husband, Clay. She starts dating online and meets several men who appear to be nice guys, but Chanin will find out the men she's meeting aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Confident, motorcycle-riding Diane Snellen is a single mom trying to make her way in the world while navigating the dating scene of Georgetown, KY. But her path in life comes to an abrupt end when she's brutally stabbed in her own home.

programme.title: Betrayed: Strangled by Love
programme.desc: Pretty, vivacious Dana Laskowski is busy juggling a boyfriend, a jealous ex-husband, a secret lover, and, most importantly, single mom responsibilities. She feels she's finally found the right balance when her life is cut short by someone close.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: New Revelations
programme.desc: The discovery of four women's bodies on Gilgo Beach was just the beginning. But who is the Long Island Serial Killer? Investigators uncover multiple suspects and shocking theories, as they race to capture this prolific killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Bad Son
programme.desc: Matthew Heikkila has always had a rocky relationship with his parents, but he has a plan on how to deal with them. On a cold November day, he murders them in their own home - and is determined to keep the nightmare going for his own girlfriend.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: High School Revenge
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter are kidnapped and held hostage by a man exacting revenge from his high school days.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Single mom Tracy is starting to turn her life around when she falls for attentive Jody. As his jealousy starts to overtake their relationship, she soon comes to realize she can run, but she can't hide.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Jewel of a Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design a new home for a jewelry maker and her son. The team will have to pull an all nighter to complete the yurt on time after fierce rains and a mismeasurement put the build far behind schedule.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rocky Mountain Cabin
programme.desc: The team brings an Appalachian-style cabin all the way to western Colorado.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Drive-Through Corn Crib
programme.desc: Mark and the guys use over 100 antique logs from two tobacco barns to build a dramatic entrance for their client's property. The drive-through double corn crib requires a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Leftovers Get Upcycled
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders are using their leftovers to build a 'Parts and Pieces Pavilion' to sell their scraps as upcycled products.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wild Rock Pavilion
programme.desc: The builders work with three centuries of materials and techniques in one project. Using custom 21st century steel brackets and hand-hewn 19th century beams, they create a pavilion for the Wild Rock Community Center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Complicated Carriage House
programme.desc: The builders pull into New Ringgold, Pennsylvania, in a covered wagon, ready to take down and move a very complicated carriage house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Unwrapping a Massive Log Tobacco Barn
programme.desc: Mark buys a massive tobacco barn with an incredible log structure hidden inside. He wants to turn the logs into a cabin, so the guys must unwrap the barn layer by layer.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barn Beam Log Cabin Experiment
programme.desc: Mark clients want bigger and bigger antique log homes, but pioneers didn't build big log cabins. They did build big barns though, so the guys try and build a 1200 sq. foot cabin using barn beams from their inventory.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A New York State of Mind
programme.desc: The builders head up the Appalachian mountain chain to the Catskill Mountains in New York to build a huge, antique log guesthouse for a couple who traded city life for country life.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On Wheels
programme.desc: Ditch the four walls, head outside, and get your fill of those portable powerhouses known as food trucks. Jeff Mauro gets happy about an angry lobster sandwich from the Happy Lobster Truck in Chicago.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Pork
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the code to true 'cue: brined pork, a flower pot, a trashcan, hardwood smoke and a lot of patience, resulting in a delicious Pulled Pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wake Up Little Sushi
programme.desc: Alton investigates the ins and outs of Japan's most popular sushi.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Curious Case of Curry
programme.desc: Alton discusses how curry was an English dish, which made India famous.

programme.desc: There's nothing like breakfast by the water to get any beachgoer's day started. Katie Lee finds the best coffee and papaya bowl Oahu's North Shore has to offer.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Every Day Is Fry Day!
programme.desc: Join Katie Lee on her mission to find the best golden-fried goodness the beach has to offer. She heads to South Carolina for local fish, shrimp and crab cakes that are battered and crisped for the perfect Fried Seafood Platter.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Gettin' Spicy
programme.desc: Katie scours the beach searching for the spiciest dishes and isn't disappointed in San Diego where her heat index is tested after trying thirty-seven different levels.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Grilled and Que'd
programme.desc: Nothing goes better with beachin' than a little grillin' and que'in'. The dishes are diverse but they all boast that amazing flavor and char that fire brings to the table. In Arizona, Katie Lee joins a local chef to grill up a striper.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Stuffed
programme.desc: Katie Lee shares the most stuffed, packed full, brimming to the rim dishes because the more, the merrier. In Florida, Katie finds amazing Empanadas and more.

programme.title: Beach Bites With Katie Lee: Unexpected Hits
programme.desc: Each area of the world has its own distinct food culture, so it's always enticing when a rogue dish becomes a hit. Whether it's spring rolls in Puerto Rico or a delectable Napoleon in Georgia's Golden Isles, Katie Lee uncovers these unique eats.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Charleston
programme.desc: Ali heads south to Charleston and starts the day off right with creamy grits topped with all the morning classics. Then a crab cake sandwich that's the talk of the town, followed by seafood-stuffed hushpuppies.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Music City Munchies
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Nashville for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Ali kicks things off with a cheesy hash brown casserole covered breakfast weenie.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation
programme.desc: Alton Brown shows you around a shrimp boat and his cousin Ray's shrimp shop.

programme.title: Good Eats: Churn Baby Churn 2
programme.desc: After a visit from federal ice cream agents and investigating the ingredients, Alton cracks the code of making homemade ice cream.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feast Over Flame
programme.desc: Visit Skylight Inn, family-run restaurant in North Carolina who have been serving whole hog-style barbecue since the mid 1800s.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Old School, New School
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets schooled by two pitmasters changing the barbecue game in Charleston, S.C. One has a pit room where whole hogs get cooked low and slow. The other makes Tex-Mex with smokes meats from a massive smoker.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Tagalong Polliwog/ Sparkly Star Switcheroo
programme.desc: Kermit's nephew, Robin, comes to visit and everyone is excited to play with him, but Kermit is very protective. When Rizzo is sad about not making a wish on a shooting star, Summer paints a sparkly star to cheer him up.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Roadsterettes! / Oh Happy Day!
programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Vampirina: Little Terror/ Super Natural
programme.desc: Vee and her friends volunteer to babysit for her baby cousin. When a family of ghost hunters comes to stay at the Scare B&B, Vee and her family spend the day trying to prove that their house is not haunted.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mixed-Up for a Day!/ Princess Clarabelle!
programme.desc: A special winner gets mixed-up for the day! When Clarabelle ends up with the hidden royal scepter, everyone in Royalandia thinks she's the new princess!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pigs and Pugs/ Bob Loves Mona
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko and the Opposite Ray/ PJ Masks vs. Bad Guys United
programme.desc: Romeo's newest device turns Owlette and Catboy into villains! All the villains join forces to finally defeat the PJ Masks once and for all!

programme.title: Martin: Got to Be There

programme.title: Martin: Beat It

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night

programme.title: Martin: Control

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sparing Carrie

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Jaguar Jungle

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Mexico Island
programme.desc: In this pop up edition, fun and interesting factoids appear as two fan survivalists are dropped on Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic
programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Botched: J-Cup Juggernaut
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif transforms a woman whose nose has been stuck at a '7 o'clock' angle, and Dr. Dubrow helps a patient get her groove back by fixing her man-boobs. Later, a woman comes from across the pond for help with her J-sized breasts.

programme.title: Botched: To Implant or Not to Implant ... That Is the Question
programme.desc: Rodrigo Alves returns after undergoing three nasal surgeries in less than a year. Later, Terry helps a Texas chef with jarring pain from her breast implants, and a dominatrix undergoes an unconventional procedure for butt projection.

programme.title: Botched: Muscles, Tucks and Forehead Flaps
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif takes on a patient who tried to treat her own skin cancer and ended up with a hole in her nose while Dr. Dubrow tackles a body builder's deflated breast.

programme.title: Botched: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who's had an implant removed three times, leaving her with one breast. Dr. Nassif assists a patient who received a surprise nose job in Peru. A UK deejay and firebreather hopes for heel implants to increase their height.

programme.title: Botched: Zombie Breasts
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif kicks the butt off a patient' nose, while Dr. Dubrow helps a single mother whose breast implant fell out while brushing her teeth. Meanwhile, a transgender twin needs the doctors help in completing her Bimbo Barbie transformation.

programme.title: Botched: Flipped Out Butt and a Pelican Neck
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who is flippin' out over her flippin' butt implants, while Dr. Nassif tries to save a patient with a wrecked pelican neck. Meanwhile, a wannabe trophy wife seeks a bigger booty to find the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Chopped: True Grits
programme.desc: Chefs are given grits in the first basket with a similar ingredient in the second and something boiled and something blue in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: $50,000 Champs Challenge: Part 1
programme.desc: Chopped champions return to the stoves, racing the clock and conquering basket after basket with the hope of moving on to the $50,000 finale. Watermelon weirdness in the first basket threatens to shake the champs' confidence.

programme.title: Chopped: $50,000 Champs Challenge: Part 2
programme.desc: It's a rough reunion with the Chopped kitchen when the returning champs find a diabolical set of ingredients in their first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: $50,000 Champs Challenge: Part 3
programme.desc: The fiercest Chopped champions are back to defend their titles in a whirlwind, no-holds-barred battle. A frozen oddity throws them a curve ball in the first round, and they find a box of something sweet plus a yummy Chinese specialty in the entree basket.

programme.title: Chopped: $50,000 Champs Challenge: Part 4
programme.desc: Passionate Chopped champions return for a shot at $50,000, and the competition kicks off with a colossal clam and a starchy comfort food in the first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: $50,000 Champs Challenge: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Four repeat champions make their triumphant return to the Chopped kitchen to do it all over again for a shot at $50,000! Jaws drop when the chefs find out what's in the first basket, and a dream cut of beef could turn into a nightmare.

programme.title: Chopped: Clambake Stakes
programme.desc: The chefs set out to make an unforgettable summer feast after learning each challenge will have a clambake theme. The entree basket includes a strange starch and plenty of gifts from the sea. Those in the final round work with a juicy fruit.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four Shades Of Chocolate
programme.desc: The most decadent chocolate treats from white chocolate all the way down to dark! There's white chocolate raspberry cheesecake, dipped and decorated waffle cones, milk chocolate mousse and, to top it all off, a chocolate orange.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: One Thing Leads to Another
programme.desc: Black beans are the focus of Ree's menu today. She makes a mango guacamole and a delicious taco pizza. Then, she makes grilled veggie burritos and a quick black bean burger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tasty Treats to Go
programme.desc: Ree cooks up her favorite tasty treats to share with people she loves. She makes pumpkin cinnamon rolls, baklava, and white chocolate shortbread.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kitchen Confessional: Dinner Through the Decades
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is confessing all about her life on a plate, from a fabulous retro Beef Stroganoff that she loved as a child of the 70s to the Pasta ai Quattro Formaggi that defined her student life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girls' Night In
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is hosting a girls' night at the lodge, complete with a tasty spread of canapes and cocktails. She makes citrus shrimp nachos and zucchini quinoa cakes with herbed yogurt.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is exploring 16-minute marvels with four awesome weeknight dinners cooked against the clock. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches topped with warm red cabbage followed by a snappy Italian sausage pasta skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Perfect One Pan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has collected her best one-pan recipes, starting with no-fuss Lemon Basil Shrimp Risotto made in one skillet. She uses a multipurpose pasta pot for insanely good Loaded Veggie Pasta.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple D Takes on Triple G
programme.desc: Chefs from Diners, Drive-in and Dives meet under Guy's roof for a culinary show down. Radishes and maple syrup are ingredients the chefs must use.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: American Heroes
programme.desc: Four American heroes - a cop, a firefighter, an EMT and an Air Force vet - test their culinary might in a battle worth up to $20,000. First, the heroes are inspired by legendary rapper-turned-judge Rev Run to "wok this way," using a wok to shop.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Culinary Saved My Life
programme.desc: Four chefs who have overcome life's adversities by following their culinary dreams compete to become a Triple G winner. First, they toast their success with a celebratory dinner that incorporates Guy Fieri's red light special: hot dogs.
